title: Decomposer Detectives
subtitle: Find the recyclers underfoot
learning_goal: Recognize decomposers and detritivores as the organisms that recycle dead material.
intro: Leaves, logs, and damp corners have cleanup crews. Find three different recyclers or detritivores.
outro: You found the organisms that turn old life into new soil.

steps.hint: Check fallen leaves, damp bark, mulch, rocks, and shady walls.
Different species count. A repeat photo of the same mushroom does not.
Try a new microhabitat: bark, soil, leaf litter, or a damp edge.
